name: XRM Local SEO Blog Pipeline - Draft Only
notes: Local manual-trigger workflow blueprint. Produces SEO/blog draft instructions only. Does not publish, deploy, or modify production content.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { generated_by_ai: true, status: 'pending-review', workflow: 'seo-blog-pipeline-local', topic: 'China procurement partner for overseas buyers', target_keyword: 'China procurement partner', buyer_segment: 'overseas developers, contractors, procurement managers', output_path: 'content/drafts/', safety: { publish: false, require_human_review: true } } }];

const item = $input.first().json; item.seo = { seo_title: 'China Procurement Partner for Overseas Buyers', meta_description: 'XRM helps overseas buyers source, compare, and coordinate reliable China suppliers for procurement and export-ready projects.', suggested_slug: 'china-procurement-partner', internal_links: ['hotel-procurement', 'ai-infrastructure-supply', 'sourcing-services'], tags: ['China procurement', 'supplier sourcing', 'RFQ support'] }; return [{ json: item }];

const item = $input.first().json; item.draft = { frontmatter: { 'generated-by-ai': true, status: 'pending-review', 'content-type': 'seo-blog-draft', 'target-keyword': item.target_keyword, 'seo-title': item.seo.seo_title, 'meta-description': item.seo.meta_description, 'privacy-reviewed': 'required' }, outline: ['Problem: overseas buyers struggle to verify suppliers', 'How a China procurement partner helps', 'RFQ support and supplier comparison', 'Quality control and export coordination', 'CTA: request RFQ support'], publish_allowed: false }; return [{ json: item }];

const item = $input.first().json; item.review_checklist = ['Confirm keyword/search intent', 'Confirm no confidential names', 'Check facts and claims', 'Check internal links', 'Confirm draft path only', 'Human approval before publishing']; return [{ json: item }];
